name: Rainbow Obby
author: Poki
description: Rainbow Obby is an obby game in which you have to make it to the top of a huge obstacle course! There's three unique game modes to choose from: Classic Mode: The original Rainbow Obby! Run, jump and climb your way across 3 different worlds with hundreds of obstacles! Car Mode: Filled with ramps, jumps and tricky roads - this mode is for the speed demons and the skilled drivers! Bike Mode: All the challenge of Classic Mode, but now you're on a bike! If you thought that would make parkouring easier, you'd be wrong... In this game there are a lot of other modes for you to explore and conquer such as Ladder Mode, Troll Mode, River Mode, Plane Mode, Knockout Mode, and Cart Mode! Don’t worry if you get stuck - you can get jetpacks, springs and other helpful items that will help you through a difficult level. Can you make it to the very top of Rainbow Obby? How to play Rainbow Obby? Walk: use WASD to walk around! Jump: use the spacebar to jump! Who created Rainbow Obby? Rainbow Obby is created by emolingo games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Rainbow Obby for free? You can play Rainbow Obby for free on Poki. Can I play Rainbow Obby on mobile devices and desktop? Rainbow Obby can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
